name: Azure Activity Log Query
description: Query Azure Activity Log for resource operation history — who did what, when, with resource provider and subscription scoping.

parameters.name: resource_providers
parameters.description: Azure resource provider e.g. Microsoft.Compute — empty for all

parameters.name: operation_name
parameters.description: operation type e.g. write, delete, action — empty for all

parameters.name: caller
parameters.description: user or service principal who performed the action — empty for all

parameters.name: resource_group
parameters.description: Azure resource group name — empty for all

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DD — derive from query or default to 30 days ago

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DD — derive from query or default to today

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: operation status e.g. Failed, Succeeded — empty for all

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: correlation ID for tracing a specific operation — empty for none
